properties.media:imagetext:
Your First Class chair is designed for maximum
comfort with touch-control recline manual
adjustments.
Overhead storage compartments are for your
personal needs. Pillows and blankets may also be
found here, or ... just ask your Flight Attendant.
Tray tables are located under the arm rests
(aisle or window side). Lift the padded cover at the
front for access.
Feature films, short subject videos and audio
programs are available on selected flights.
Headsets will be distributed shortly after take off.
Seat pockets contain a number of passenger
comfort items, including an emergency card,
motion sickness bag and a complimentary copy
of the USAir magazine.
Lighting and air vents are conveniently located
overhead for your control.
Complimentary writing portfolios and playing
cards are available for your convenience.
There is a wide selection of popular magazines
on board... your Flight Attendant will distribute
these. A complimentary copy of USA Today will
be distributed on selected flights.
Predeparture beverages will be offered after you
have been seated. Please keep in mind all cups
and glasses must be collected prior to take off.
USAir's beverage service includes:
Alcoholic Beverages
Bailey's Irish Cream
Barcardi Rum
Beefeater Gin
Beefeater Gin Martini
Canadian Club
Dewars White Label Scotch
Jack Daniels Black Label
Johnny Walker Black Label
Smirnoff Vodka
Wild Turkey Bourbon
Premium varietal wines and champagne are
available as are cordials on selected flights.
Beers
Michelob
Lowen Brau
Michelob Light
Brewed Coffee
Hot Tea
Hot Drinks
Brewed Decaffeinated Coffee
Hot Chocolate
Bouillon
Apple Juice
Orange Juice
Tomato Juice
Coca-Cola
Cold Drinks
Diet Coke
Sprite
Diet Sprite
Canada Dry Ginger Ale
Mixers
LaCroix Sparkling Mineral Water
Canada Dry Tonic Water
Mr. & Mrs. T Bloody Mary Mix
On Lunch and Dinner flights of 3 hours or more,
a dessert, cordial and coffee service will be
presented for your enjoyment.
